autoCaption.title: Auto Caption
autoCaption.description: Automatically generate captions from video to text

help.step1Desc: Click "Browse Files" or drag and drop a video file (MP4, MOV up to 500MB) into the upload area.
help.step2Desc: Click "Generate Captions" to process your video. The system will automatically transcribe the audio and create timed caption chunks.
help.step3Desc: View the generated transcript chunks in the right panel. Each chunk shows the text and time range. Click on any chunk to jump to that moment in the video.
help.step4Desc: Play the video to see word-by-word caption highlighting synchronized with the audio. The current word is highlighted in yellow.

help.step1Desc: Type or paste your text script into the input area. This will be converted to speech.
help.step2Desc: Choose from Woman, Man, Boy, or Girl voice styles to match your content needs.
help.step3Desc: Click "Generate Voice" to create the audio. The system will process your text and generate natural-sounding speech.
help.step4Desc: Use the audio player to preview your generated voice. Adjust playback speed if needed, then download the audio file when satisfied.

voiceGenLive.title: Voice Gen Live
voiceGenLive.description: Real-time voice generation with instant playback

help.step1Desc: Type the text you want to convert to voice in the input field.
help.step2Desc: Choose from Woman, Man, Boy, or Girl voice styles.
help.step3Desc: Click "Start Stream" to begin real-time voice generation. The audio will play as it's generated with smart pausing.
help.step4Desc: Use the Stop button to end the stream. The system automatically pauses at natural break points for better listening experience.

translate.title: Translate
translate.description: Multi-language translation for scripts and captions

help.step1Desc: Type or paste the text you want to translate into the source text area.
help.step2Desc: Choose the source language (language of your text) and target language (language to translate to) from the dropdown menus. Use the swap button to quickly switch between them.
help.step3Desc: Click "Translate" to convert your text. The translated text will appear in the target text area.
help.step4Desc: Use the copy button to copy the translated text to your clipboard, or directly use it from the text area.

contentCreator.title: Content Creator
contentCreator.description: Write hooks, captions, and social-ready scripts

help.step1Desc: Choose what you want to create: Hook (attention-grabbing opening lines), Caption (social media captions), Script (video scripts), or Hashtags (relevant hashtag suggestions).
help.step2Desc: Describe your topic or what you want to create content about.
help.step3Desc: Select the tone that matches your brand: Engaging, Professional, Casual, Funny, Inspiring, or Dramatic.
help.step4Desc: Click "Generate Content" to create your content. Use the copy button to copy the generated text to your clipboard.

help.step1Desc: Describe your story idea, theme, or starting point in the prompt field.
help.step2Desc: Choose a genre: Fantasy, Sci-Fi, Mystery, Romance, Thriller, or Adventure.
help.step3Desc: Select story length: Short (500-1000 words), Medium (2000-5000 words), or Long (5000+ words).
help.step4Desc: Pick the narrative tone: Engaging, Dramatic, Mysterious, Lighthearted, Epic, or Intimate.
help.step5Desc: Click "Generate Story" to create your long-form narrative. Copy or download the generated story when complete.

srtSub.title: SRT Sub
srtSub.description: Translate and adapt existing SRT subtitle files

help.step1Desc: Upload your existing SRT subtitle file by clicking the upload area or dragging and dropping.
help.step2Desc: Choose the source language (language of your SRT file) and target language (language to translate to). Use the swap button to switch languages.
help.step3Desc: Click "Translate SRT" to process your subtitle file. The system will translate all subtitle entries while preserving timing.
help.step4Desc: Use the Preview button to review translated subtitles. Each entry shows the ID, time codes, and translated text. Download the translated SRT file when ready.

recapper.title: Recapper
recapper.description: Turn videos into recap scripts with tone and POV

help.step1Desc: Upload your video file (MP4, WebM, OGG, MOV) by clicking the upload area or dragging and dropping.
help.step2Desc: Choose the tone for your recap: Engaging, Professional, Casual, Dramatic, Humorous, or Informative.
help.step3Desc: Select the narrative perspective: First Person (I, me, my), Second Person (You, your), Third Person (He, she, they), or Narrator (objective storytelling).
help.step4Desc: Click "Generate Recap Script" to create your recap. The system analyzes your video and creates a script matching your selected tone and POV. Copy or download the script when complete.

help.step1Desc: Describe your thumbnail in detail. Include visual elements, colors, text overlays, and style. Example: "A futuristic cityscape at sunset with neon lights, bold text overlay saying TECH REVIEW".
help.step2Desc: Choose a visual style: Bold (high contrast), Minimal (clean and simple), Vibrant (colorful), Dramatic (intense), Professional (polished), or Playful (fun and creative).
help.step3Desc: Select the format: 16:9 (YouTube standard), 9:16 (TikTok/Shorts), 1:1 (Square/Instagram), or 4:3 (Classic format).
help.step4Desc: Click "Generate Thumbnail" to create your image. Preview the result and download when satisfied.

help.step1Desc: Upload your document file (TXT or DOCX format) by clicking the upload area or dragging and dropping.
help.step2Desc: Choose the source language (language of your document) and target language (language to translate to). Use the swap button to switch languages.
help.step3Desc: Select the format for your translated document: TXT (plain text) or DOCX (Microsoft Word format).
help.step4Desc: Click "Translate Document" to process your file. The system will translate the entire document while preserving formatting. Download the translated document when complete.

videoRecap.title: Video Recap
videoRecap.description: Sync voiceovers, remove original audio, and add logos

help.step1Desc: Upload your video file (MP4, WebM, OGG, MOV) by clicking the upload area or dragging and dropping.
help.step2Desc: Upload an audio file (MP3, WAV, OGG, M4A) to replace or sync with the video audio. Use the sync offset slider to adjust timing.
help.step3Desc: Upload a logo image (PNG, JPG, WebP, SVG). Customize the position (top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right, center), size (small, medium, large), and opacity.
help.step4Desc: Toggle "Remove Original Audio" to replace the video's audio with your voiceover. If disabled, the voiceover will be mixed with the original audio.
help.step5Desc: Click "Process Video" to generate your final video with synced voiceover, removed original audio (if enabled), and added logo. Download the processed video when complete.

help.step1Desc: Upload your video file (MP4, WebM, OGG, MOV) by clicking the upload area or dragging and dropping.
help.step2Desc: Click on any editing tool to activate it:
help.step2List1: Trim: Set start and end times to cut your video. Use sliders or "Set to Current" buttons.
help.step2List2: Add Text: Enter text to overlay on your video.
help.step2List3: Filters: Apply visual filters (Vintage, B&W, Warm, Cool, Dramatic, or None).
help.step2List4: Adjust: Use sliders to adjust brightness, contrast, and saturation.
help.step2List5: Speed: Change playback speed from 0.25x to 2x.
help.step3Desc: All changes are applied in real-time. Use the video player to preview your edits.
help.step4Desc: Select export format (MP4, WebM, MOV) and quality (1080p, 720p, 480p), then click "Export Video" to download your edited video.

help.step1Desc: Upload your audio or video file (MP3, WAV, OGG, M4A for audio; MP4, WebM, OGG, MOV for video) by clicking the upload area or dragging and dropping.
help.step2Desc: Preview your uploaded media using the built-in player to ensure it's the correct file.
help.step3Desc: Click "Generate SRT" to process your media. The system will transcribe the audio and create timed subtitle entries.
help.step4Desc: Use the Preview button to review the generated subtitle entries. Each entry shows the ID, time codes, and text. Download the SRT file when ready.

transcribe.title: Transcribe
transcribe.description: Convert audio or video to text

help.step1Desc: Upload your audio or video file (MP3, WAV, OGG, M4A for audio; MP4, WebM, OGG, MOV for video) by clicking the upload area or dragging and dropping.
help.step2Desc: Preview your uploaded media using the built-in player to ensure it's the correct file.
help.step3Desc: Click "Transcribe" to process your media. The system will convert the audio to plain text transcription.
help.step4Desc: Use the Copy button to copy the transcribed text to your clipboard, or download it as a .txt file.

newsAutomation.title: News Automation
newsAutomation.description: Automate news collection, translation, and email delivery
newsAutomation.subject: Subject

help.step1Desc: Choose a news source from the dropdown (CNN, BBC, Reuters, etc.).
help.step2Desc: Select the language you want the news translated to.
help.step3Desc: Toggle "Generate Image" if you want AI-generated images included with the news. Enter the recipient email address and customize the email subject line.
help.step4Desc: Enable scheduling to automate news delivery. Choose frequency (Once, Daily, Weekly, or Custom) and set the time. The system will automatically collect, translate, and email news at the scheduled time.
help.step5Desc: Click "Start" to begin the automation process. The system will collect news, translate it, generate images (if enabled), and send it to the specified email address.

home.title: Your AI Minions
home.subtitle: All-in-one AI suite for content creation
